title: 3 Product Reveal
result_description: Three products reveal one after another via quick beat-synced transitions, each with a text/price callout.

inputs.name: product_clips
inputs.what_to_film: Film a short clip of each product (or each angle) with identical framing and lighting. Add a consistent motion you can transition on — e.g. swipe a hand across, or a quick push toward the lens.

params.note: lay the 3 product clips in sequence
add a quick transition (zoom/spin/swipe) timed to the motion or a beat
sync the cuts to a trending audio track's beats
add text/price callouts on each reveal

result.description: Three products revealed in a snappy beat-synced sequence with callouts.
success_criteria: Each product has a text/price callout
